sql.query: SELECT items.id,items.workflowId,items.taskId,items.workflowName,items.referenceCode,items.eventType,items.eventLabel,items.eventDate,items.status,items.locationId,items.locationName,items.teamId,items.teamName,items.detail FROM (SELECT CONCAT('start-',w.id) id,w.id workflowId,NULL taskId,w.workflowName,w.referenceCode,'start_date' eventType,'Start date' eventLabel,w.startDate eventDate,w.status,w.locationId,l.locationName,w.ownerTeamId teamId,tm.teamName,NULL detail FROM tbl_workflows w LEFT JOIN tbl_locations l ON l.id=w.locationId AND l.tenantId=w.tenantId LEFT JOIN tbl_teams tm ON tm.id=w.ownerTeamId AND tm.tenantId=w.tenantId WHERE w.tenantId=:tenantId AND w.startDate IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT CONCAT('target-',w.id),w.id,NULL,w.workflowName,w.referenceCode,'target_date','Target date',w.targetDate,w.status,w.locationId,l.locationName,w.ownerTeamId,tm.teamName,NULL FROM tbl_workflows w LEFT JOIN tbl_locations l ON l.id=w.locationId AND l.tenantId=w.tenantId LEFT JOIN tbl_teams tm ON tm.id=w.ownerTeamId AND tm.tenantId=w.tenantId WHERE w.tenantId=:tenantId2 AND w.targetDate IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT CONCAT('field-',fv.id),w.id,NULL,w.workflowName,w.referenceCode,CASE WHEN fv.fieldKey='show_date' THEN 'show_date' ELSE 'custom_date' END,COALESCE(f.fieldLabel,CASE WHEN fv.fieldKey='show_date' THEN 'Show date' ELSE REPLACE(fv.fieldKey,'_',' ') END),fv.valueDate,w.status,w.locationId,l.locationName,w.ownerTeamId,tm.teamName,CASE WHEN fv.fieldKey='show_date' THEN NULLIF(CONCAT_WS(' / ',l.locationName,s.spaceName,c.configurationName),'') ELSE fv.fieldKey END FROM tbl_workflow_field_values fv INNER JOIN tbl_workflows w ON w.id=fv.workflowId AND w.tenantId=fv.tenantId LEFT JOIN tbl_template_custom_fields f ON f.id=fv.templateCustomFieldId AND f.tenantId=fv.tenantId LEFT JOIN tbl_locations l ON l.id=w.locationId AND l.tenantId=w.tenantId LEFT JOIN tbl_spaces s ON s.id=w.spaceId AND s.locationId=w.locationId AND s.tenantId=w.tenantId LEFT JOIN tbl_space_configurations c ON c.id=w.configurationId AND c.spaceId=w.spaceId AND c.tenantId=w.tenantId LEFT JOIN tbl_teams tm ON tm.id=w.ownerTeamId AND tm.tenantId=w.tenantId WHERE fv.tenantId=:tenantId3 AND fv.valueDate IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT CONCAT('task-',t.id),w.id,t.id,w.workflowName,w.referenceCode,'task_due',t.taskName,t.dueDate,w.status,w.locationId,l.locationName,w.ownerTeamId,tm.teamName,CONCAT_WS(' — ',ws.stageName,REPLACE(t.status,'_',' ')) FROM tbl_tasks t INNER JOIN tbl_workflows w ON w.id=t.workflowId AND w.tenantId=t.tenantId LEFT JOIN tbl_workflow_stages ws ON ws.id=t.workflowStageId AND ws.tenantId=t.tenantId LEFT JOIN tbl_locations l ON l.id=w.locationId AND l.tenantId=w.tenantId LEFT JOIN tbl_teams tm ON tm.id=w.ownerTeamId AND tm.tenantId=w.tenantId WHERE t.tenantId=:tenantId4 AND t.dueDate IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT CONCAT('complete-',w.id),w.id,NULL,w.workflowName,w.referenceCode,'completion','Completed',w.completedDate,w.status,w.locationId,l.locationName,w.ownerTeamId,tm.teamName,NULL FROM tbl_workflows w LEFT JOIN tbl_locations l ON l.id=w.locationId AND l.tenantId=w.tenantId LEFT JOIN tbl_teams tm ON tm.id=w.ownerTeamId AND tm.tenantId=w.tenantId WHERE w.tenantId=:tenantId5 AND w.completedDate IS NOT NULL) items WHERE items.eventDate>=COALESCE(NULLIF(:dateFrom,''),DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE,INTERVAL DAYOFMONTH(CURRENT_DATE)+6 DAY)) AND items.eventDate<COALESCE(NULLIF(:dateTo,''),DATE_ADD(LAST_DAY(CURRENT_DATE),INTERVAL 7 DAY)) AND (:workflowId=0 OR items.workflowId=:workflowId2) AND (:locationId=0 OR items.locationId=:locationId2) AND (:teamId=0 OR items.teamId=:teamId2) AND (:statusEmpty='' OR items.status=:status) AND (:searchEmpty='' OR CONCAT_WS(' ',items.workflowName,items.referenceCode,items.eventLabel,items.locationName,items.teamName,items.detail) LIKE CONCAT('%',:search,'%')) ORDER BY items.eventDate,items.workflowName,items.eventType
